Trafalgar Group
Survey Research | TheTrafalgarGroup.com

Methodology: n=952 Likely General Election Voters | Survey Conducted March 18-19, 2026 | Multi-Mode (IVR/Online)

Sample Breakdown
Totals  Men  Women  White  Black  Hispanic  Asian  18-44  45-64  65+  College  Non-College  Rep  Dem  Ind
% of Sample  100%   49%    51%    70%    12%     11%       5%    31%    41%    28%    42%       58%        36%  34%  30%

Congressional Generic Ballot
For whom would you vote for Congress in 2026?

By Race
White  Black  Hispanic  Asian
Democrat       37%    78%     50%      44%
Republican     56%    12%     36%      42%
Undecided       7%    10%     14%      14%

By Education
College  Non-College
Democrat        51%       37%
Republican      40%       54%
Undecided        9%        9%

By Age Group
18-44  45-64  65+
Democrat       55%    42%    40%
Republican     33%    49%    52%
Undecided      12%     9%     8%
